items.name_cn:
『Balenciaga lique』
Hourglass Crocodile Green Small
Balenciaga's seasonal heavyweight Hourglass crocodile bag features a unique, iconic curved silhouette that stands out instantly. The smooth surface forms a crescent shape with a metal B-shaped pull ring. The calfskin texture is exquisite and full of character! Go for it, don't stop!! 🖤🖤🖤
Small size: 19x8x21cm
